Ethereum precompile addresses (reference):

0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001  ECDSA recovery (ecrecover)
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002  SHA-256 hash
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000003  RIPEMD-160 hash
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000004  identity / data copy
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000005  modular exponentiation (EIP-198)
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000006  alt_bn128 point addition (EIP-196)
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000007  alt_bn128 scalar mul
0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000009  BLAKE2b compression (EIP-152)

These are hardwired into the EVM — not wallets, do not hold user funds.
